name: Git Editor (Level/Collab Merger, History, Backups)
description: Per-level commit history for the GD editor, collab merging, and more.

size-multiplier.name: Top Row Button Size Multiplier
size-multiplier.description: Scales Git Editor top-row buttons and spacing in editor pause menu.

compress-local-database.name: Compress Local Database
compress-local-database.description: Store git-editor.db compressed as git-editor.db.zip on disk. Reduces save directory size. Unzipped automatically on startup.

compress-export-files.name: Compress Export Files
compress-export-files.description: Compress exported .gdge files using zip. Imported files are detected automatically regardless of compression.
